message.text:
🤩 Good Day Fellow Effectuators 🤩

*Kindly introduce:*
📌 Name: *Carol Ching* 
📌Position: *Solution Consultant*
📌Company: *Horizon Institution Sdn Bhd*
📌 Nature of Business: *Provide Safety Consultancy and Safety training to client. Our vision is to preserve, empower and improve health, safety and environmental standards in every workplace we serve.*
📌Location: Klang 
📌 Who you would like to connect with / explore collaboration:
I would like to connect with business owners, HR professionals, safety practitioners, and management teams who are looking for practical solutions to improve workplace safety, employee competency, regulatory compliance, and overall organizational performance.

I am also open to collaborating with training providers, consultants, industry experts, and organizations that are interested in developing customized training programmes, safety consultancy services, and HRD Corp-claimable learning solutions. My goal is to understand each organization’s challenges and provide suitable, practical, and results-driven solutions rather than offering a one-size-fits-all programme.

📌 Contact Me at: 016-5487 144 (Carol)

message.text:
✨ Health & Wellness Business Connect #2

*FINANCIAL WELLNESS*
_Where Inner Financial Awareness Meets Practical Financial Resilience_

> Money pressure is real.

> Cost of living is rising.
> AI and technology are changing careers and businesses.
> Markets are uncertain.
> Business owners and professionals are making financial decisions under more pressure than before.

- _This session is created for entrepreneurs, business owners, leaders, investors, wellness professionals, and working professionals who want to build a healthier relationship with money while strengthening long term financial resilience._

This is not a typical finance talk.

_It is a curated business networking experience where money mindset, emotional awareness, wellbeing, leadership, and practical financial strategies come together._

> One afternoon.
> Fresh perspectives.
> Powerful conversations.
> Valuable connections.

If you are growing a business, leading a team, or planning your financial future, this is a good space to rethink Financial Wellness and connect with the right people.

Event Details
- 📅 *31 July 2026*
- ⏰ *1:00 PM to 5:00 PM*
- 📍 *WORQ Intermark*

*Register here:* https://eventsize.com/event/health-wellness-business-connect-2
